title: Bone Item fix
description: Makes the bone use the same colors as the bonemeal.
body: This Pack aims to fix bug [MC-265678](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-265678) This is done by making the bone use the same colors as the bonemeal. *If you want to make is so the bonemeal uses the same colors as the bone then go [here.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bonemeal_item_fix)
